name: HWR_PROFILE_INDEXING_EVENTS
description: Table to store data related to profile indexing events.

columns.Name: INDEXING_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: ID field associated with the indexing event

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the event. DONE, RUNNING

columns.Name: ENTITY
columns.Comments: Entity the event is for oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:globalprofile

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The date when the indexing event ended.

columns.Name: SNAPSHOT
columns.Comments: Snapshot manifest of the files in repo

columns.Name: DOCS_IN_STREAM_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of documents in stream for the event.

columns.Name: DOCS_IN_INDEX
columns.Comments: Number of document in the main index

columns.Name: INDEX_SIZE
columns.Comments: Total size of the snapshot on disk in KB

columns.Name: TOTAL_TIME
columns.Comments: TOTAL_TIME column to track the total time of the indexing event.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: ERROR message associated with the event.

columns.Name: SERVER_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the sever this action ran on

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
